{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/48850892?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hibrian827/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hibrian827/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hibrian827/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hibrian827/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/hibrian827", "id": 48850892, "login": "hibrian827", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ4ODUwODky", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hibrian827/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hibrian827/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hibrian827/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hibrian827/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hibrian827/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/hibrian827", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-53509", "cvss": {"score": 5.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "### Summary
A known vulnerability CVE-2026-33060 indicated tools including ckan_package_search and sparql_query that accept a base_url parameter had the risk of making HTTP requests to arbitrary endpoints without restriction. A fix was applied to filter out ip addresses. However, a method to bypass exists.

### Details
CKAN MCP Server validates caller-supplied CKAN server URLs by inspecting only the parsed hostname string before issuing outbound HTTP requests. In `src/utils/http.ts`, hostname aliases such as `ip6-localhost` are not equal to `localhost`, are not dotted IPv4 literals, and are not bracketed IPv6 literals, so they pass the SSRF filter but can resolve to loopback when the server performs the request. A remote MCP caller that can invoke CKAN tools with a `server_url` can therefore make the server connect to local or private addresses and, for CKAN-shaped responses, receive response-derived data.

### Fix
Replaced the single `hostname === 'localhost'` check with a blocked-hostname `Set` covering `ip6-localhost` and `ip6-loopback`. Patched in commit `c761045a1b7c5f40d2626540dd2ef1d4feb91f8c`.

---
@aborruso/ckan-mcp-server thanks **hibrian827** for responsibly disclosing this issue.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g84h-j7jj-x32p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-07T19:35:57Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g84h-j7jj-x32p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g84h-j7jj-x32p"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53509"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-07T19:35:57Z", "references": ["https://github.com/ondata/ckan-mcp-server/security/advisories/GHSA-g84h-j7jj-x32p", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3xm7-qw7j-qc8v", "https://github.com/ondata/ckan-mcp-server/releases/tag/v0.4.106", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g84h-j7jj-x32p"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/ondata/ckan-mcp-server/security-advisories/GHSA-g84h-j7jj-x32p", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/ondata/ckan-mcp-server", "summary": "@aborruso/ckan-mcp-server: SSRF via base_url allows access to internal networks (Potential fix bypass of CVE-2026-33060)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-07T19:35:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g84h-j7jj-x32p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.4.106", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@aborruso/ckan-mcp-server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.4.106"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @aborruso/ckan-mcp-server: SSRF via base_url allows access to internal networks (Potential fix bypass of CVE-2026-33060)
